name: pm-requirement-review-simulator
tagline: Stress-test your PRD with 5-role simulated review meetings / PM 需求评审模拟器：五角色攻防推演，输出存活率报告
description: PRD review stress-test simulator for product managers. Five cross-functional roles (engineering, operations, design, executive, legal) challenge your product requirements with realistic pushback under one consistent review standard. Outputs a scored HTML or Markdown survival report with 5-dimension radar chart, counterargument playbook, RACI matrix, meeting script, and action checklist. PM 需求评审模拟器。技术/运营/设计/老板/法务五角色按统一标准评审，确定性评分引擎逐子项打分，输出带雷达图的 HTML 或 Markdown 存活率报告、神回复话术、RACI 协作包和会议脚本。
author: Chris1Wang3
